title: calamintha repens
intro: Calamintha repens, also known as creeping calamintha, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. The medicinal properties of Calamintha repens include its ability to act as a digestive aid, relieve stress, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues such as indigestion and nausea. Calamintha repens can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
